name: BlockNote (Block-Based Rich Text Editor)

performance.notes: ProseMirror/TipTap based; performant for typical document sizes

agent_readiness.notes: Notion-style block editor built on TipTap/ProseMirror. <BlockNoteView editor={editor} />. Block types: paragraph, heading, bullet/numbered list, image, code, table. Drag-and-drop block reordering. Slash menu (/block). Collaborative editing via Y.js. AI extension for LLM-powered editing. shadcn/ui themes. Custom block types. Export to Markdown/HTML/JSON. Uploading images. React-only. Alternative to TipTap for Notion-like UX out of the box.

gotchas: MPL-2.0 license (copyleft for modifications, not for use)
best_when: Notion-style document editors with block manipulation
Apps needing drag-and-drop block reordering out of the box
Simpler alternative to TipTap when you want Notion UX
avoid_when: Production apps needing v1 stability guarantee
summary: BlockNote is a Notion-style block editor built on TipTap/ProseMirror. <BlockNoteView /> with drag-and-drop blocks, slash commands, collaborative editing via Y.js, AI extensions, and shadcn themes. Export to Markdown/HTML/JSON. React-only. Pre-v1 but rapidly developing. Best when you want Notion UX out of the box without building it on raw TipTap. TipTap for maximum extensibility; Lexical for Facebook-backed stability.
